mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallpaper_tag (name, slug, creator_username, enabled, usage_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{creatorUsername}, #{enabled}, #{usageCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wallpaper_tag WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO wallpaper_tag_ref (wallpaper_id, tag_id, created_at) VALUES (#{wallpaperId}, #{tagId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id FROM wallpaper_tag_ref WHERE wallpaper_id = #{wallpaperId}

SELECT wt.id, wt.name, wt.slug, wt.enabled, wt.usage_count AS usageCount FROM wallpaper_tag_ref wtr INNER JOIN wallpaper_tag wt ON wt.id = wtr.tag_id WHERE wtr.wallpaper_id = #{wallpaperId} ORDER BY wt.usage_count DESC, wt.id ASC
